style_prompt: Architectural diagram. Hand-drawn line work, two-tone navy and rust on warm cream paper. Crisp legible labels in French. No photo realism, no people, no logos.
image_prompt: An editorial diagram on warm cream paper, deep navy line work with small rust accents. A header at the top reads "ÉTAT DE PRÉPARATION". Beneath it a two-by-two grid of four equal cells, each labelled clearly: "ÉDUCATION", "SÉCURITÉ DES DEUX CÔTÉS", "AUTOSUFFISANCE", "GOUVERNANCE". Calm, architectural, legible labels. No logos, no people. All text labels in Canadian French. Match the composition of the source image exactly; only the text labels change.
composed_prompt:
